title: IIM-Ahmedabad to study why PLI schemes fell short, recommend course correction
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   IIM-Ahmedabad will conduct a study to analyze the performance of Production-Linked Incentive (PLI) schemes.
*   The primary goal is to understand the reasons why these schemes have not fully met their intended targets or "fell short."
*   The institute will provide recommendations for policy adjustments and improvements to ensure greater effectiveness of future PLI initiatives.

title: Inside the 1880 Supreme Court ruling which Trump cited in birthright citizenship case - why it matters now? Key facts
content:
The article examines a specific 1880 Supreme Court ruling.
*   It details how this historical decision was recently cited by Donald Trump in the context of birthright citizenship discussions.
*   The piece explains the ruling's current relevance and provides key facts to understand its contemporary implications.

title: Trump’s economic approval rating hits record low as Americans grow pessimistic on inflation, costs: Poll
content:
Donald Trump's economic approval rating has reached an all-time low.
*   This decline is linked to growing pessimism among Americans about inflation.
*   Rising costs of living are also a major concern for the public, contributing to the low approval.

title: Who is John Sauer? Lawyer leading Trump’s birthright citizenship case in Supreme Court
content:
John Sauer is a lawyer.
*   He is leading a Supreme Court case on behalf of Donald Trump.
*   The case specifically addresses birthright citizenship.

title: US Supreme Court signals skepticism over Trump’s birthright citizenship order
content:
The US Supreme Court has signaled skepticism.
*   This skepticism is directed at former President Trump's birthright citizenship order.
*   The Court's indication suggests doubts or concerns regarding the order.

title: Meghalaya, Starlink sign MoU to provide satellite-based digital connectivity, says Conrad K Sangma
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Meghalaya has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Starlink.
*   The agreement aims to provide satellite-based digital connectivity across the state.
*   The partnership was announced by Meghalaya Chief Minister Conrad K Sangma.

title: Triple tailwinds accelerate FY26 PV sales 8% YoY, Maruti to increase prices as cost pressure mounts
content:
Passenger vehicle (PV) sales are projected to accelerate by 8% year-over-year in FY26, driven by multiple favorable market factors.
*   Maruti Suzuki plans to increase its vehicle prices.
*   This price hike is in response to mounting cost pressures faced by the company.

title: GST revenue in March 2026 at 10-month high of ₹2 lakh crore, driven by taxes on imports
content:
GST revenue for March 2026 reached ₹2 lakh crore.
*   This figure represents a 10-month high for GST collections.
*   The significant increase was primarily driven by higher taxes on imports.

title: 'Sun is rising on Integrity': Artemis II astronaut's message from spacecraft after launch
content:
An astronaut from the Artemis II mission delivered a message from their spacecraft.
*   The message was sent after the mission's launch into space.
*   The core of the message was the symbolic phrase, "'Sun is rising on Integrity.'"

title: ‘Subject of rumour’: Scott Mills breaks silence after BBC sacking over decades-old sex offence probe
content:
Scott Mills has broken his silence following his sacking from the BBC.
*   His dismissal is connected to an investigation into a decades-old sex offence.
*   Mills is speaking out specifically because he has been the 'subject of rumour' regarding this probe.
